description: Outer semispan of the CTA planform. B1 remains fixed in meters, so the total semispan is B1 + wing span and wing span = B2 + B3.
CTA body chord. C1 is derived from C0 with fixed sweep S and straight TE(C0->C1).
CTA transition-wing chord C3. This section remains anchored at y=8.041 m.
CTA outer-wing chord C4.
CTA transition-wing fraction measured against wing span. Wing span is the outer semispan excluding the fixed body segment B1, so wing span = B2 + B3.
CTA wing-tip chord C5.
CTA sweep S1 (mapped from s2_deg).
CTA sweep S2 (mapped from s3_deg).
Geometric twist at CTA section C0/C3.
Geometric twist at CTA section C4.
Geometric twist at CTA section C5.
